meaning: n.基里巴斯(西太平洋上一共和国)
examples: Kiribati has an estimated population of 103,000.
The 2004 Summer Olympics were the first for the island nation of Kiribati.
Three countries, Kiribati, Marshall Islands and Tajikistan, had sites added for the first time.
Of Kiribati's 33 islands, 21 are inhabited -- though most of its population is based in the Gilbert Islands.
